definition:
A man of the tribe of Levi living at the time of Egypt and Wilderness, first mentioned at Exo.6.22; 
 son of: Uzziel (H5816); 
 brother of: Mishael (H4332), Sithri (H5644), Micah (H4318J) and Isshiah (H3449I); also called Elzaphan at Exo.6.22; 1x
 § Elizaphan or Elzaphan = "my God has protected"
1) a Kohathite chief in the wilderness
2) a Zebulunite chief
3) Uzziel's son, Mishael's brother in time of Moses
